grant_and_term.grant: Right, license, and privilege to adopt McDonald's System, advertise as franchisee, use designated marks, and occupy restaurant. Limited to restaurant's location only.
grant_and_term.term: Specified in §2(b) — typically 20 years for traditional
grant_and_term.no_renewal_right: Explicitly acknowledged in §28(a) — no promise or representation as to renewal or new franchise

fee_obligations.royalty: §8(a) — Monthly, 10th of following month, [%] of Gross Sales
fee_obligations.payment_method: §8(b) — Automatic debit/credit transfer program specified by McDonald's
fee_obligations.interest_on_delinquencies: §8(c) — Highest rate allowed by law, or 15% if no max. Monthly compounding.
fee_obligations.initial_fee: §9 — $45,000. Earned at opening. Full refund if construction not completed within 1 year.
fee_obligations.gross_sales_definition: §7 — All revenues from all business conducted at/from the restaurant. Excludes sales tax. Credit sales treated as sale when made.

operating_obligations.compliance_with_system: §12 — Must comply with entire McDonald's System including designated menu, food specs, preparation methods, quality/appearance, facilities/service uniformity
operating_obligations.maintenance: §12(a) — Clean, wholesome, prescribed QSC standards; maintain building, fixtures, equipment, signage, seating, decor, parking in good condition
operating_obligations.equipment_purchase: §12(b) — Purchase per McDonald's specifications and layout
operating_obligations.building_conformity: §12(c) — Keep in accordance with standard blueprints/plans
operating_obligations.no_alterations: §12(d) — No building conversions, alterations, additions without prior written consent
operating_obligations.repairs_replacements: §12(e) — Make repairs for damage/wear and to maintain conformity
operating_obligations.hours_of_operation: §12(g) — 7 days/week, at least 7am-11pm or as prescribed; maintain sufficient supplies and personnel for maximum capacity
operating_obligations.employee_uniforms: §12(h) — Designated color/design, neat/clean appearance, competent/courteous service
operating_obligations.food_handling: §12(i) — Use only approved containers/packaging, flavorings/ingredients, food handling methods
operating_obligations.legal_compliance: §12(k) — All federal/state/local laws at franchisee's expense

best_efforts.requirement: §13 — Personally devote full time and best efforts. Keep free from conflicting enterprises or activities detrimental to restaurant business.

training_obligations.hamburger_university: §6 — Must enroll self and managers at HU or designated centers
training_obligations.costs_borne_by_franchisee: Travel, living, compensation for self and employees
training_obligations.costs_borne_by_mcd: HU maintenance, overhead, staff, materials, training tools

reporting_obligations.monthly_receipts: §10 — By 11am CST first business day of each month
reporting_obligations.annual_pnl_and_bs: §10 — Within 90 days of fiscal year end, GAAP
reporting_obligations.audit_right: McDonald's may inspect/audit at all reasonable times
reporting_obligations.audit_cost_allocation: If understatement ≥2% of Gross Sales, franchisee pays

restrictions_noncompete.during_term: §11(a) — No direct/indirect interest in any similar restaurant business without prior written consent
restrictions_noncompete.post_term: §11(b) — 18 months after termination for any reason or sale. No direct/indirect interest within 10-mile radius of restaurant.
restrictions_noncompete.system_duplication: §11(c) — Cannot appropriate/use/duplicate System at any other restaurant
restrictions_noncompete.confidentiality: §11(d) — Cannot disclose any portion of System to non-franchisees
restrictions_noncompete.mark_use_limitation: §11(e) — No use except in connection with restaurant operation
restrictions_noncompete.de_minimis_exception: Ownership <2% of publicly traded company shares

assignment_transfer.general_rule: §15 — No assignment/transfer without prior written consent. Consent not arbitrarily withheld.
assignment_transfer.death_disability: §15(a) — May assign to spouse/heirs/blood relatives if qualified. McDonald's may manage for up to 12 months. After 12 months, McDonald's may purchase at FMV.
assignment_transfer.corporate_assignment: §15(b) — To wholly-owned corporation with prescribed stockholders agreement
assignment_transfer.rofr: §15(c) — 20 days notice; McDonald's has 10 days to match. Continues on subsequent offers.
assignment_transfer.other_transfer: §15(d) — Consent criteria: work experience, financial background, character, full-time devotion, locality residence, equity interest, conflicting interests, new franchise criteria. Transferee assumes full liability. Transferor remains liable for full term. Royalty auto-adjusts to then-prevailing rate.

material_breaches.trigger: Failure to maintain/operate in good, clean, wholesome manner per McDonald's standards
Bankruptcy, insolvency, receiver appointment, general assignment for creditors (30 days to dismiss petition)
Non-payment within 30 days of due date
Loss of right of possession of premises
System disclosure (§11(d) or manual disclosure violation)
Knowingly selling unapproved/non-conforming food or failing to sell designated products
Failure to make prompt payment of undisputed invoices or remittances
Public conduct reflecting materially and unfavorably on McDonald's (excluding legitimate political activity)
Felony conviction or plea, or crime likely to adversely affect System

termination_triggers.other_breaches: §19 — Non-material breaches. Not grounds for termination except if repeated. McDonald's may seek injunctive relief, damages, or specific performance.

post_termination.immediate_entry: §20(a) — McDonald's has immediate right to enter/take possession on material breach
post_termination.purchase_option_breach: §20(b) — McDonald's has 30-day option to purchase fixtures/equipment/signs/property at FMV. No payment for intangibles.
post_termination.purchase_option_expiration: §20(c) — Same 30-day option on term expiration. No intangibles.
post_termination.obligations: §20(d) — Return manuals; stop using System/marks; no disclosure; no similar marks

indemnification.scope: §24 — Franchisee indemnifies and holds McDonald's harmless against all judgments, settlements, penalties, expenses (including attorneys' fees) for any claim arising from franchisee/employee/agent acts or omissions, or any act on restaurant premises
indemnification.defense_obligation: At McDonald's election, franchisee must also defend McDonald's

insurance_requirements.workers_comp: §17(a) — As prescribed by law; Employer's Liability $100K/$500K/$100K minimum
insurance_requirements.carrier_rating: AM Best IX+ financial size, A+ or A policyholders rating
insurance_requirements.failure_to_obtain: McDonald's may purchase and add premiums to rent

dispute_resolution.attorneys_fees: §23 — McDonald's entitled to recover reasonable attorneys' fees if it prevails
dispute_resolution.integration: §26 — Franchise constitutes entire agreement; supersedes all prior agreements; no modification except in writing by officer/franchising director

acknowledgments.marks_ownership: §28(g) — McDonald's or affiliates are sole owners
acknowledgments.personal_offer: §28(j) — Cannot be accepted by or transferred to others

new_term_policy.process: Assessment throughout term. Apply in year 16. VP recommendation in year 17. New Term Committee (U.S. management) decides. Decision is final.
new_term_policy.criteria: Consistently meet National Franchising Standards, comply with FA, support initiatives/values, contribute to system success
new_term_policy.conditions: May include reinvestment, rebuilds, relocations, real estate issues, ownership issues. McDonald's may require controlling interest in additional property.
new_term_policy.royalty_on_new_term: Remains same as previous rate for restaurant
new_term_policy.rent_on_new_term: Per then-current new term rent policy
new_term_policy.if_not_offered: Owner/Operator advised in writing. Decision is final. May get alternative offer allowing sale to qualified buyer before new term starts, subject to legal release.
new_term_policy.shorter_terms: May offer shorter-term franchise or restaurant closure in some situations (real estate, economic viability)
